response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior/staff full-stack engineer with roughly 15 years of broad experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, which nominally meets the experience-length bar. However, this is a director-level AI strategy role requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms, deep cloud-platform strategy fluency, and experience advising strategic customers and inspiring teams through disruptive endeavors. The resume shows only recent, early-stage exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP generators) at re:cinq, no advanced AI degree, no recognized AI products, and no evidence of the strategic leadership scope or cloud-platform strategy this position demands.
strengths: ~15 years of broad engineering experience across many stacks and domains
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based, mentoring/talks)
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No director-level or strategic leadership experience; profile is hands-on IC
Lacks recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms
No cloud-platform strategy or customer-advisory experience required by the role
